{{Quote|My protocol droids are not programmed to interact with customers, so should you desire assistance I can aid you.|Kaar welcoming a customer|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Karal Kaar''' was a [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] employed by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Droids Inc.]]. He worked at the [[Aratech Mercantile]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] in [[3956 BBY]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Nemo]] described him as a bit brusque albeit a good being; the two often shared games of [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] during the early [[Time/Legends|hours]] of the morning.

==Behind the scenes==
When Karal Kaar introduces himself, he says 'Karal Karr.' The [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|official guide]] for the game portrays Kaar as an Ithorian.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
